permits.description: Selective demo in basement, 1st, 2nd, floors. Remove crawlspace in back of basementand build new concrete wall at same area. Add bathroom in basement, and install new bedrooms in basement. 1st floor, renovate kitchen with new cabinetry, add new finishes and cabinets in front of home. Rebuild and finish back porch. 2nd floor, Install new baths and renovate finishes to existing rooms. Install new windowsand doors. Replace roofing and repair siding.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($412,780); keyword: renovate; minor: roofing

llm_assessment.reasoning: The permit describes extensive whole-house 'gut' renovations including kitchen, multiple bathrooms, basement conversion, and structural work with a high project cost exceeding $400,000.
